articles.title: India's first hydrogen-powered train to be flagged off on July 17: 10 facts and photos you shouldn't miss
articles.summary: India’s first hydrogen-powered train is ready for launch! Marking a major milestone for Indian Railways, the country’s first hydrogen will be flagged off by Prime Minister Narendra Modi on July 17. This is the first time that India is introducing a train that produces its own electricity onboard using hydrogen, which is widely regarded as the cleanest fuel available.

articles.title: Where are gold and silver prices heading? Inflation, oil and Fed bets hold the key
articles.summary: MCX silver is showing signs of a potential recovery after the recent decline, with prices expected to rebound towards the Rs 227,000 mark in the near term. The metal has a key support level around Rs 218,000, which is likely to limit further losses.

articles.title: NEET UG 2026 result declared: AIR 1 Aryan Gupta says ‘Hard work never goes unnoticed’, shares advice for aspirants
articles.summary: The NTA has announced the NEET UG 2026 results, with over 11.21 lakh candidates qualifying for medical admissions. Punjab's Aryan Gupta, who secured a joint AIR 1 with 715 marks, credited his success to 16–17 hours of daily study and perseverance.

articles.title: ISC Class 12 improvement result 2026 declared at cisce.org, rechecking window open till July 20: Check details here
articles.summary: The Council for the Indian School Certificate Examinations (CISCE) has released the ISC Class 12 Improvement Result 2026 on its official website, cisce.org. Students can download their revised scorecards using their login credentials.

articles.title: Re-NEET UG 2026 result declared at neet.nta.nic.in; Aryan Gupta, Panshul Bansal top with 715 marks
articles.summary: The National Testing Agency has announced the NEET UG 2026 examination results today. Over 11.21 lakh candidates successfully qualified for undergraduate medical and dental courses.

articles.title: NTA declares Re-NEET UG 2026 result: Direct link to download here
articles.summary: The National Testing Agency is expected to announce the Re-NEET UG 2026 result very soon. Candidates can check the official website for the latest updates regarding the result declaration.
